position_contract.direction: long spot and short USD-M perpetual
position_contract.committed_capital_denominator: spot entry notional plus equal futures margin reserve

execution_contract.center_reference_prices: event-minute closes and settlement-minute mark-price closes

cost_contract.stress_net_pnl_usdt: gross_pnl_usdt minus four actual-notional taker fees minus 1 bps of each actual fill notional

risk_metric_contract.sequential_drawdown_committed_capital_bp: maximum running peak minus cumulative stress-net committed-capital return, with initial equity at zero
risk_metric_contract.expected_shortfall_10pct_committed_capit: arithmetic mean of the worst max(1, ceil(0.10 * episode_count)) episode returns
risk_metric_contract.positive_calendar_year: sum of stress-net committed-capital episode returns is strictly positive
risk_metric_contract.single_year_episode_fraction: largest UTC-year episode count divided by scored episode count
risk_metric_contract.single_episode_share_of_positive_pnl: largest positive stress-net PnL divided by total positive stress-net PnL; undefined support fails the gate

result.authorized_next_step: none; reject this elevated-funding carry family
